title: KRYPTON 2000W Double Hot Plate for Table Top Cooking | 2 Ring Hob with Cast Iron Heating Plates, Adjustable Temperature Knob | Lightweight & Portable Electric Hob for Home Camping & Caravan Cooking
features: ✅ 2 CAST IRON HOBS(150mm * 150mm), PERFECT COOKING SOLUTION - This 2000W hot plate has high quality and durable cast iron heating elements for quick and sustained heating. Highly versatile, portable 2 cast iron hobs(150mm * 150mm) with multi-cooking functions makes it ideal for camping, holiday homes, parties, events, student accommodation, or as an extra appliance in a busy kitchen.

✅ VARIABLE HEAT CONTROL - Make heating much easier - With various heat settings, these Hot Plate Hob can accommodate a wide range of cooking requirements from simmering to boiling, heating has never been more easy or simple.

✅ COMPACT & PORTABLE, NON-SLIP RUBBER FEET - This hot plate is not only compact for easy storage, but also portable. We built this hot plate with safety and convenience in mind - The feet of this double hot plate is non-slip.

✅ OVERHEAT PROTECTION, AUTO THERMOSTAT, INDICATOR LIGHT - This safety feature avoids danger when the temperature of the hot plate goes too high. The indicator light turns off immediately and when temperature is back to normal, it turns back on and heating resumes.

✅ ALTERNATIVE USES, 2 YEAR WARRANTY: Highly versatile, table-top cast iron hob with multi-cooking functions makes it ideal for camping, holiday homes, parties, events, student accommodation, or as an extra appliance in a busy kitchen. Use it for Warming, Cooking, Boiling, Frying, Simmering, and much more.
description: Product Description CAST IRON COOKING SURFACE This 2000W hot plate has high quality and durable cast iron heating elements for quick and sustained heating. DUAL BURNERS Portable 2 cast iron hobs(150mm * 150mm) with multi-cooking functions makes it ideal for camping & holiday homes. FAST HEATING Hot Plate Hob can accommodate a wide range of cooking requirements from simmering to boiling, heating has never been more easy or simple. ADJUSTABLE TEMPERATURE CONTROL The indicator light turns off immediately and when temperature is back to normal. VERSATILE COMPATIBILITY Highly versatile, table-top cast iron hob with multi-cooking functions makes it ideal for camping. OVERHEAT PROTECTION This safety feature avoids danger when the temperature of the hot plate goes too high. INDICATOR LIGHT The indicator light turns off immediately & it turns back on and heating resumes. COMPACT & PORTABLE This hot plate is not only compact for easy storage, but also portable.
